summary: A single-story rectangular bunker or fortified structure with a flat roof. The building features a brick upper section, stone/sandstone middle walls, and a concrete foundation platform. Four evenly-spaced window openings are visible on the front facade. The structure is set into excavated terrain with a white concrete perimeter base.

shape.overall_form: rectangular box, partially sunken into terrain
shape.symmetry: bilateral symmetry along length axis; four evenly-spaced windows

rebuild_hints: Excavate rectangular pit approximately 12×18 blocks, depth ~3 blocks below surface
Build concrete foundation base layer across entire footprint
Construct stone/sandstone wall section (middle tier) approximately 2-3 blocks high
Add brick layer above stone section for upper facade
Place four evenly-spaced window openings (2×2 glass blocks each) on front and back faces
Create flat roof using brick blocks
Add concrete trim/border around entire perimeter at ground level
Ensure symmetrical window placement: approximately 3 blocks apart center-to-center
uncertainties: Exact interior layout and floor plan not visible
Roof composition (solid brick vs. other materials) not fully clear from angles shown
Depth of excavation pit relative to building height uncertain
Whether windows are simple openings or have internal frames/shutters
Exact block count for each material layer requires closer inspection
Presence of doors or other entrances not visible in provided views
